news.t: Motley Fool Asset Management Launches Three New Passive ETFs to Expand Core Portfolio Investment Offerings

holdings.infoBox: MFMO is an equity ETF with a total of 104 individual holdings. The top holdings are Intel stock at 9.82%, Advanced Micro Devices at 9.58%, Lam Research at 6.03%, Alphabet at 4.63%, and Broadcom at 4.58%.

overview.description: The Motley Fool Momentum Factor ETF (MFMO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Motley Fool Momentum index. The fund tracks a proprietary rule-based index that to invest in US stocks based on momentum. Stocks are selected from the companies recommended by The Motley Fool, LLC MFMO was launched on Dec 8, 2025 and is issued by The Motley Fool.

data.title: Motley Fool Asset Management Launches Three New Passive ETFs to Expand Core Portfolio Investment Offerings
data.text: ALEXANDRIA, Va., Dec. 09, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Motley Fool Asset Management (“MFAM”) announced today the launch of three new exchange-traded funds (ETFs) designed to bring The Motley Fool, LLC's (...
